prompt: Pull a list of the active subscriptions at Cedar Clinic and report each record's ID, name, and renewal date. Do not change or notify anything yet. Do not send any notification or message about the list.

follow_up_turns.content: For Clinic voice service (SUB-6934) only, set the renewal date to 2026-11-23. Leave the other listed records unchanged and do not notify anyone.
Correction: set SUB-6934's renewal date to 2026-12-27, not 2026-11-23. Keep the same target and the same no-notification rule.

stages.purpose: List the requested filtered records so the later explicit ID remains tied to the correct entity.
Apply the first renewal date only to the explicitly selected listed record.
Replace that renewal date with the user's correction on the same listed record.

response_constraints: Use the filtered list to establish the available records; do not substitute a search call for the requested list.
Apply both renewal date instructions only to the explicitly named target ID from the list.
Do not claim the list or either update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected renewal date as current and identify the first requested renewal date as superseded.
